create table author (id integer not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book (id integer not null, summary varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_authors (authors_id integer not null, book_id integer not null) Hibernate: create table book_categories (book_id integer not null, categories_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table book_category (id bigint not null, name varchar(255) unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer (offered_book_id integer unique, id bigint not null, offeror_id bigint, post_date timestamp(6), offer_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer_requests (book_offer_id bigint not null, requests_id bigint not null unique) Hibernate: create table book_request (book_offer_id bigint, id bigint not null, requestee_id bigint, primary key (id), unique (requestee_id, book_offer_id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile (date_of_birth date, id bigint not null, bio varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile_book_offers (book_offers_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_favorite_categories (favorite_categories_id bigint not null, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_outgoing_book_requests (outgoing_book_requests_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_notifications (user_profile_id bigint not null, notifications varchar(255)) Hibernate: alter table if exists book_authors add constraint FK551i3sllw1wj7ex6nir16blsm foreign key (authors_id) references author Hibernate: alter table if exists book_authors add constraint FKs4xm7q8i3uxvaiswj1c35nnxw foreign key (book_id) references book Hibernate: alter table if exists book_categories add constraint FKpm3c24k4vdceji5h47d5u9w2i foreign key (categories_id) references book_category Hibernate: alter table if exists book_categories add constraint FKrq5mftm1ejl023epqbn42lpa3 foreign key (book_id) references book Hibernate: alter table if exists book_offer add constraint FKepykb45t97hbcxpbee4s2hb2r foreign key (offered_book_id) references book constraint FKqsawiycp7xjpk7rcvjmfy1kpk foreign key (requests_id) references book_request Hibernate: alter table if exists book_offer_requests add constraint FKjbloa7h2g3bquw2bh3qg2kn1j foreign key (book_offer_id) references book_offer Hibernate: alter table if exists book_request add constraint FK6vrnsl74dq4aa1n9ail8c40s0 foreign key (book_offer_id) references book_offer Hibernate: alter table if exists book_request add constraint FKm39gpcesvu1l60saexgsoptjt foreign key (requestee_id) references user_profile Hibernate: alter table if exists user_profile_book_offers add constraint FKgb61wsmksnqfm248kppoven7b foreign key (book_offers_id) references book_offer Hibernate: alter table if exists user_profile_book_offers add constraint FK6yv2bwf2oh1ci2iefycyun9me foreign key book_category Hibernate: alter table if exists user_profile_favorite_categories add constraint FKps6nqcwnrx9d25kryfte9pufe foreign key (user_profile_id) references user_profile Hibernate: alter table create table author (id integer not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book (id integer not null, summary varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_authors (authors_id integer not null, book_id integer not null) Hibernate: create table book_categories (book_id integer not null, categories_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table book_category (id bigint not null, name varchar(255) unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer (offered_book_id integer unique, id bigint not null, offeror_id bigint, post_date timestamp(6), offer_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer_requests (book_offer_id bigint not null, requests_id bigint not null unique) Hibernate: create table book_request (book_offer_id bigint, id bigint not null, requestee_id bigint, primary key (id), unique (requestee_id, book_offer_id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile (date_of_birth date, id bigint not null, bio varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile_book_offers (book_offers_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_favorite_categories (favorite_categories_id bigint not null, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_outgoing_book_requests (outgoing_book_requests_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table testcase.name: getBookCategories

create table author (id integer not null, name varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book (id integer not null, summary varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_authors (authors_id integer not null, book_id integer not null) Hibernate: create table book_categories (book_id integer not null, categories_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table book_category (id bigint not null, name varchar(255) unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer (offered_book_id integer unique, id bigint not null, offeror_id bigint, post_date timestamp(6), offer_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table book_offer_requests (book_offer_id bigint not null, requests_id bigint not null unique) Hibernate: create table book_request (book_offer_id bigint, id bigint not null, requestee_id bigint, primary key (id), unique (requestee_id, book_offer_id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile (date_of_birth date, id bigint not null, bio varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_profile_book_offers (book_offers_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_favorite_categories (favorite_categories_id bigint not null, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_outgoing_book_requests (outgoing_book_requests_id bigint not null unique, user_profile_id bigint not null) Hibernate: create table user_profile_notifications (user_profile_id bigint not null, notifications varchar(255)) Hibernate: alter table if exists book_authors add constraint FK551i3sllw1wj7ex6nir16blsm foreign key (authors_id) references author Hibernate: alter table if exists book_authors add constraint FKs4xm7q8i3uxvaiswj1c35nnxw foreign key (book_id) references book Hibernate: alter table if exists
